name: incident_update
description: Update an existing incident with a new status, message, or affected component changes. Use this to post progress updates, change severity, or resolve incidents.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the status page.

parameters.name: incident_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the incident to update.

parameters.name: incident[status]
parameters.description: New status: investigating, identified, monitoring, resolved.

parameters.name: incident[impact_override]
parameters.description: Override the calculated impact: none, minor, major, critical.

parameters.name: incident[component_ids]
parameters.description: Updated array of affected component IDs.

parameters.name: incident[deliver_notifications]
parameters.description: Whether to send notifications for this update.

incident.body: The issue has been resolved. API latency is back to normal.
